creator: jhein@timing.com
text:
This vuxml entry...

http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/3ce8c7e2-66cf-11dc-b25f-02e0185f8d72.html

... can be updated to apply to *seamonkey* < 1.1.5

All the MFSAs listed there are now shown as fixed for SM 1.1.5 ...

http://www.mozilla.org/projects/security/known-vulnerabilities.html#seamonkey1.1.5
